title: Terence McGovern

'''Terence Sean "Terry" McGovern''' is an American actor, voice actor, television broadcaster, radio personality, and acting instructor who looped the dialogue of several [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], and provided [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] walla, in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]. His most notable dialogue is during the [[Mind trick/Legends|Jedi mind trick]] scene outside the cantina, uttering the famous phrase "These aren't the droids we are looking for" repeating [[Alec Guinness]].

McGovern subsequently provided voices for a number of the [[LucasArts]] ''Star Wars'' video games. He is widely credited by [[George Lucas]] for coining the phrase "[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]" (according to the actor, a reference to a real-life friend, Bill Wookey, as an excuse for being late to a session).

{{Bio-stub}}

==Works==
===Filmography===
*{{Film|IV}} - Cantina Walla, Various Stormtroopers
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' – [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] Commander, [[Pirate/Legends|Pirate]] Raider, Rebel Soldier 2, Stormtrooper 2, Civilian Man, [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]], [[Abron Mar]]
*[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] – [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]]
*''[[Star Wars Trilogy Arcade]]'' – [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Admiral Ackbar]], Controller, Rebel B
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' – Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], Rebel Pilot 2
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] – [[Ratts Tyerell/Legends|Ratts Tyerell]], [[Bozzie Baranta]]
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' – Stormtrooper #1
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' – [[Kol Kotha]], Trader
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – Jedi Knight, Stormtrooper
